component.name: CutWire Prism
component.summary: Live media trigger and overlay tool

description.p: CutWire Prism is a beginner-friendly live media trigger and overlay tool built with Qt 6, FFmpeg, and OpenGL. It is designed for school events, small concerts, and sports, combining instant clip triggering with live visual control.

ul.li: Dynamic clip grid with instant playback
Video, image, slideshow, webcam, and screen capture sources
Per-clip trim, crop, and overlay editing
Fullscreen output for projection or streaming

screenshot.caption: CutWire Prism live media control interface

description.p: Initial Flatpak release of CutWire Prism.
